delivery_notes: Physical PLN delivery; requires PLN nostro account or local custodian
No fixing lag — settles T+2 on standard basis
WIBOR-based money market is relevant for forward pricing

options.delta_label_convention: Delta labels (25DC, 25DP, 10DC, 10DP) refer to the BASE currency, EUR. 25DC = 25-delta EUR call (PLN put); 25DP = 25-delta EUR put (PLN call).
options.illiquidity_note: PLN options market is deeper than other CE3 peers; 1Y is tradeable in size

notes: PLN rates are above EUR rates, giving positive carry for EUR long
Carry is modest relative to EM; more predictable than TRY/BRL
NBP rate decisions are the primary carry driver

market_structure.skew_driver: balanced two-way flows; EU membership constrains extreme moves
market_structure.liquidity_profile: best liquidity in CE3; deep enough for institutional size in spot and options

risk_notes: EU membership constrains the downside tail but does not eliminate it
NBP independence: NBP has intervened in FX; political risk to central bank independence is real
CE3 beta: PLN trades with regional risk sentiment; HUF/CZK moves are correlated
Russia proximity: geopolitical events affecting CE3 region affect PLN disproportionately
Deliverable: physical delivery requires operational setup that NDFs do not
